title: The Problem Solvers | Anton Osika at Lovable
summary: Lovable is a software development platform that allows users to build applications through conversational interaction without requiring an engineering team. The platform achieved millions of users within two months of launch, leveraging Claude integration as a key component of its go-to-market strategy and competitive advantage.
